task: #338 annual launch-epoch sweep 2000-2099 on the #327 SILVER under V4-strict

v4_strict_model.spice_kernel_source: JPL/NAIF generic_kernels/spk/satellites/a_old_versions/ura111.bsp; 5 classical Uranian moons + Uranus + Earth + Sun, 1900-2099 ET

sweep_params.sampling_caveat: Annual sampling cannot resolve sub-year periodicities; if the boundary analysis suggests periods << 1 yr (e.g. Umbriel-Oberon synodic ~5.99 days), the annual grid is aliased and finer sampling is needed.
